<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十四]][[zh:十一月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十四]][[zh:十一月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十四]][[zh:十一月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840020]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 14|qq=November 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kanji (era)|en|Kanji (era)|WD=Q1193874|lt=Kanchi}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1087|en|1087|WD=Q19461|lt=1087}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}） – {{ill|Gosannen War|en|Gosannen War|WD=Q1187411|lt=Gosannen no Eki}} ended. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|December 25|en|December 25|WD=Q2745|lt=December 25}}） – The {{ill|Abolition of the han system|en|Abolition of the han system|WD=Q331905|lt=Haihan Chiken}} reform led to the birth of {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}. * 明治4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1871, 12月25日) – By the same reform, {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|WD=Q133924|lt=Ōita Prefecture}} was also established.
== Births == * {{ill|Chōkan|en|Chōkan|WD=Q1193904|lt=Chōkan}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1164|en|1164|WD=Q19674|lt=1164}} {{ill|December 28|en|December 28|WD=Q2832|lt=December 28}}) – {{ill|Emperor Rokujō|en|Emperor Rokujō|WD=Q357046|lt=Emperor Rokujō}}, the 79th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1176|en|1176|WD=Q19693|lt=1176}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1630|en|1630|WD=Q6856|lt=1630}} {{ill|December 17|en|December 17|WD=Q2413|lt=December 17}}) – {{ill|Kaibara Ekken|en|Kaibara Ekken|WD=Q1721396|lt=Kaihara Ekken}}, a {{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died {{ill|1714|en|1714|WD=Q6878|lt=1714}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|WD=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|735|en|735|WD=Q23576|lt=735}} {{ill|December 2|en|December 2|WD=Q2296|lt=December 2}}) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|en|Prince Toneri|WD=Q1362200|lt=Prince Sotoneri}}, the fifth prince of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|WD=Q335181|lt=Emperor Tenmu}}, who led the editing of the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki}} (died {{ill|676|en|676|WD=Q31098|lt=676}}). * {{ill|Kanji (era)|en|Kanji (era)|WD=Q1193874|lt=Kanchi}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1087|en|1087|WD=Q19461|lt=1087}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – {{ill|Kiyohara no Iehira|en|Kiyohara no Iehira|WD=Q6418987|lt=Kiyohara Iehiro}}, a warrior of the Heian period. * {{ill|Kajō|en|Kajō|WD=Q1193892|lt=Kashō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1107|en|1107|WD=Q19511|lt=1107}} {{ill|December 29|en|December 29|WD=Q2862|lt=December 29}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Kimoto|ja|藤原公実|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Kimoto|1=Fujiwara no Kinzane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10514083}}, a kugyō and {{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waka poet|qq=}} of the Heian period (born {{ill|1053|en|1053|WD=Q19368|lt=1053}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1603|en|1603|WD=Q6735|lt=1603}} {{ill|December 16|en|December 16|WD=Q2410|lt=December 16}}) – {{ill|Yagyū Munenori|ja|柳生宗章|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagyū Munenori|1=Yagyū Muneaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11534528}}, a practitioner of {{ill|Kenjutsu|en|Kenjutsu|WD=Q249608|lt=Kenjutsu}} of the Azuchi–Momoyama period (born {{ill|1566|en|1566|WD=Q6638|lt=1566}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1627|en|1627|WD=Q6833|lt=1627}} {{ill|December 21|en|December 21|WD=Q2603|lt=December 21}}) – {{ill|Sakai Tadatoshi|en|Sakai Tadatoshi|WD=Q11644106|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi}}, the first lord of the {{ill|Tanaka Domain|en|Tanaka Domain|WD=Q420800|lt=Tanaka Domain}} in {{ill|Suruga Province|en|Suruga Province|WD=Q864170|lt=Suruga Province}}, and the first lord of the {{ill|Kawagoe Domain|en|Kawagoe Domain|WD=Q3034465|lt=Kawagoe Domain}} in {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|WD=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province}} (born {{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1726|en|1726|WD=Q6936|lt=1726}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}}) – {{ill|Sakakibara Masakuni|ja|榊原政邦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakakibara Masakuni|1=Sakakibara Masakuni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11541708}}, the second lord of the {{ill|Murakami Domain|en|Murakami Domain|WD=Q849483|lt=Murakami Domain}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|en|Echigo Province|WD=Q666514|lt=Echigo Province}}, and the first lord of the {{ill|Himeji Domain|en|Himeji Domain|WD=Q1062190|lt=Himeji Domain}} in {{ill|Harima Province|en|Harima Province|WD=Q1047523|lt=Harima Province}} (born {{ill|1675|en|1675|WD=Q7624|lt=1675}}). * {{ill|Kan'en|en|Kan'en|WD=Q1145723|lt=Kannen}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1749|en|1749|WD=Q7607|lt=1749}} {{ill|December 23|en|December 23|WD=Q2676|lt=December 23}}) – {{ill|Maruyama Gondazaemon|en|Maruyama Gondazaemon|WD=Q1906010|lt=Maruyama Gentaemon}}, a 3rd-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born {{ill|1713|en|1713|WD=Q6873|lt=1713}}).

{{Not to be confused with|November 14|qq=November 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kanji (era)|en|Kanji (era)|WD=Q1193874|lt=Kanchi|1=Kanji (era)}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1087|en|1087|WD=Q19461|lt=1087|1=1087}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11|1=December 11}}） – {{ill|Gosannen War|en|Gosannen War|WD=Q1187411|lt=Gosannen no Eki|1=Gosannen War}} ended. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|December 25|en|December 25|WD=Q2745|lt=December 25|1=December 25}}） – The {{ill|Abolition of the han system|en|Abolition of the han system|WD=Q331905|lt=Haihan Chiken|1=Abolition of the han system}} reform led to the birth of {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. * 明治4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1871, 12月25日) – By the same reform, {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|WD=Q133924|lt=Ōita Prefecture|1=Ōita Prefecture}} was also established.
== Births == * {{ill|Chōkan|en|Chōkan|WD=Q1193904|lt=Chōkan|1=Chōkan}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1164|en|1164|WD=Q19674|lt=1164|1=1164}} {{ill|December 28|en|December 28|WD=Q2832|lt=December 28|1=December 28}}) – {{ill|Emperor Rokujō|en|Emperor Rokujō|WD=Q357046|lt=Emperor Rokujō|1=Emperor Rokujō}}, the 79th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1176|en|1176|WD=Q19693|lt=1176|1=1176}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1630|en|1630|WD=Q6856|lt=1630|1=1630}} {{ill|December 17|en|December 17|WD=Q2413|lt=December 17|1=December 17}}) – {{ill|Kaibara Ekken|en|Kaibara Ekken|WD=Q1721396|lt=Kaihara Ekken|1=Kaibara Ekken}}, a {{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died {{ill|1714|en|1714|WD=Q6878|lt=1714|1=1714}}).
